layout_strategy.global: Generous spacing. Dark mode foundation with bright saturated accents. Immersive depth.
layout_strategy.hero_section: Massive typography, centered layout, 'Know Before You Go.' headline, prominent search bar, confetti-like 🚩 scattered.
layout_strategy.directory_grid: Bento-style asymmetric grid or masonry feel. Wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Infinite scroll setup.
layout_strategy.admin_dashboard: Dense 'Control Room' mode. Tight gaps (gap-6), functional density. Solid dark background, minimal card borders.

red_flag_card.details: Include company logo, person name+title. Large italic quote with stylized oversized quotation marks. Sources as labeled link buttons. 1-5 🚩 score.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF4D4D] text-[#FFF8F0] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-[#e03a3a] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#FFF8F0] text-[#FFF8F0] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-[#FFF8F0] hover:text-[#0D1B2A] transition-colors

search_bar.style: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 text-[#FFF8F0] rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg w-full max-w-2xl shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,77,77,0.2)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF4D4D]

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0D1B2A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#FFF8F0]/10 px-8 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

animations.page_transition: framer-motion opacity and slight y-axis translation
animations.logo: waving flag animation on the 🚩 emoji next to text logo
animations.hero_confetti: subtle floating animation for scattered 🚩 emojis in background
animations.hover_states: lift and scale on cards (translate-y-1, scale-102)

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette. Background must be #0D1B2A, cards must be #FFF8F0. Do NOT use #FFF8F0 as the main page background.
Since the card background is #FFF8F0 (Cream), ensure all text inside the cards is #0D1B2A (Navy) to maintain a high contrast ratio. Do not use white text on cream cards.
Do NOT use pure Inter for headings. Use Nunito Extrabold.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements, buttons, links, form inputs, and key UI markers like balances or status tags.
Use Framer Motion to scatter 🚩 emojis in the hero background and give them a slow, subtle floating animation.
Admin dashboard must be dense and cardless or have subtle borders for widgets, maximizing data density.
Build the submission form dynamically using Shadcn components (Form, Input, Button) but style them to match the playful dark mode theme (Navy background, coral borders on focus).
Never use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use the provided asset URLs for mocked data.
Implement 'infinite scroll' logic for the red flag directory.
Ensure the hero header reads 'Know Before You Go.' accurately, stylized large and imposing, yet playful.
Use lucide-react for standard icons, but prominently feature the 🚩 emoji for branding.
Moderator login must be a clean, minimal layout focused on Google Social Login.
Remember to write React code in .js / .jsx files as TypeScript is not used for this setup.
